channel.title: Data-Lineage on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Lineage on Pi Stack

item.title: OpenLineage vs DataHub vs Apache Atlas: Self-Hosted Data Lineage Guide 2026
item.description: Data lineage — the ability to track where data comes from, how it transforms, and where it ends up — has become essential for any organization running non-trivial data pipelines. When a dashboard shows a wrong number, lineage tells you exactly which upstream table, job, or transformation introduced the error. When regulators ask where personal data flows, lineage provides the audit trail.
